---
title: "Projects"
description: "A selection of projects Tyler Reckart has built, from iOS apps to developer tools. Work that spans creative technology, open source, and practical software."
---
A selection of things I've built. Some are products, some are tools, some are experiments that stuck around longer than expected.

<div class="project-content">

### [Arbiter](https://arbiter.run)
Arbiter is a stream-native agent runtime with advisor gates, typed temporal memory, artifacts, multi-tenant HTTP/SSE API, TUI, and CLI.

</div>
</div>

<div class="project-content">

### [Albums](https://albums.fm)
An app for people who refuse to let streaming companies own their taste. Catalog your physical collection, integrate with streaming services, play local files.

</div>
</div>

<div class="project-content">

### [Hyperzsh](https://github.com/tylerreckart/hyperzsh)
Minimal zsh prompt built for git workflows. Shows what you need, hides what you don't. Fast, clean, opinionated.

</div>
</div>

<div class="project-content">

### [HappyPath](https://github.com/tylerreckart/HappyPath)
Stop annoying users with review prompts after three app launches. Ask for reviews when people are most likely to give them. Respects users, improves ratings.

</div>
</div>

More on [GitHub](https://github.com/tylerreckart), where I keep the rest of my experiments, contributions, and half-finished ideas.
